'''tanaha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nyctitropism|nyctitropism]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-n-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nyctitropism|nyctitropism]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tanaha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || tænæhæth || tænæhæj || tænæhæsh || tænæhæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || tananahath || tananahaj || tananahash || tananaha
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || tanahath || tanahaj || tanahash || tanaha
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || tanafhafth || tanafhafj || tanafhafsh || tanafhaf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || tanahatha || tanahaja || tanahasha || tanahaka
|-
| [[Patient]] || tanahath || tanahaj || tanahash || tanaha
|-
| [[Possessive]] || tanahathal || tanahajal || tanahashal || tanahakal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || tanahaathatha || tanahaajaja || tanahaashasha || tanahaaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || tanahathan || tanahajan || tanahashan || tanahakan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || tanahathaoro || tanahajaoro || tanahashaoro || tanahakaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
